title: feat: add Stripe Portal auto top-up
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Set it and forget it
gist.blurb: We've added auto top-ups for Pollen packs so your generations never get interrupted. Just set your threshold and let the hive handle the rest.
gist.summary: Introduced Stripe Customer Portal integration and auto top-up functionality for Pollen packs, ensuring uninterrupted API usage.
gist.impact: Users can now configure their accounts to automatically purchase more Pollen when their balance drops below a set threshold.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot managing a continuous, automatic flow of resources. A magical pollen dispenser that refills itself, representing the auto top-up feature.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot working together at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) magical pollen dispenser that automatically refills a glass jar. The robot holds a shiny golden pixel coin. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot working together at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) magical pollen dispenser that automatically refills a glass jar. The robot holds a shiny golden pixel coin. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
